bids.reasoning: At t=0.00 there is no time pressure to concede, and the opponent’s first offer gives me the minimum utility on every issue. I am targeting my maximum-utility bid while establishing my preferred anchor, especially on the high-weight issues issueA and issueB.

I am targeting very high utility because it is still extremely early (t=0.02), so there is little need to concede much yet. The opponent has only made a small concession, moving issueA from valueE to valueD while keeping everything else at valueE, so I will make a minimal concession on a low-weight issue while holding firm on the most important issues.

I am targeting a very high utility bid around 0.98 because it is still extremely early at t=0.04 and there is no need to make major concessions yet. The opponent’s offers remain very low utility to me and show only minimal, inconsistent concession, so I will hold firm on the high-weight issues A, B, and C while making a small concession on a low-weight issue and avoiding an exact repeat of my prior bid.

At t=0.06 it is still very early, so I am targeting a high-utility bid around 0.96 rather than making major concessions. The opponent has only offered very low-utility bids to me, with small movement on isolated issues, so I will concede only on my lowest-weight issues while holding firm on issueA, issueB, and issueC.

I targeted a high-utility bid around 0.94 because it is still very early, so there is no need to make major concessions yet. The opponent’s offers have improved somewhat for me, especially on issueA and issueB in the latest bid, but they are still far below my acceptable range, so I am only conceding on low-weight issueE while holding the most important issues firm.

I am targeting a high utility around 0.94 because it is still very early at t=0.10, so there is no need to make large concessions yet. The opponent has made some concessions but is not consistently improving their offers to me, with the latest offer worse than their best prior one, so I will hold firm on high-weight issues A, B, and C while varying concessions on lower-weight issues D and E. There are no opponent messages to factor in.

I targeted a high own-utility bid around 0.92 because it is still early in the negotiation, so I should not concede on the most important issues yet. The opponent has mostly offered very low-value bids for me, though they have shown some movement on issueA/issueB; I am therefore conceding only on lower-weight issueD and issueE while holding firm on issueA, issueB, and issueC.

I am targeting a high-utility bid around 0.90 because it is still early at t=0.14, so there is no need to concede on my most important issues yet. The opponent has improved their offers somewhat, especially on issueA and issueB in the latest bid, but they still consistently push issueC/D/E toward valueE, so I will concede mainly on lower-weight issueD and issueE while holding issueA, issueB, and issueC at valueA.

I am targeting a high-utility bid around 0.86 because it is still early at t=0.16, so there is no need to make major concessions yet. The opponent’s offers have improved somewhat for me but remain mostly unfavorable, and they consistently place issueD/issueE at valueE, so I concede mainly on low-weight issueE while holding firm on high-weight issueA, issueB, and issueC.

I am targeting about 0.86 utility: still high because it is early at t=0.18, but with concessions on the low-weight issues D and E. The opponent’s offers have improved somewhat for me, especially on issueA, but they still keep pushing issueD/issueE low, so I concede there while holding firm on the higher-weight issues A, B, and C.

I am targeting a high utility bid of about 0.84 because it is still early at t=0.20, so I should not concede on the high-weight issues A, B, and C yet. The opponent has sometimes conceded on A or B but usually keeps D/E near valueE, so I am conceding the two lowest-weight issues to valueE while holding firm on my main priorities; there are no messages to weigh.

I am targeting a high utility around 0.84 because it is still early at t=0.22, but I have already conceded on the lowest-weight issues D and E. The opponent’s offers remain quite low for me and show no clear sustained concession, so I will hold firm on the high-weight issues A, B, and C while varying the low-weight concessions to avoid repeating my last bid exactly.

At t=0.24, I am still targeting a strong utility around 0.84 because there is no immediate deadline pressure, but I am conceding mainly on my lowest-weight issues. The opponent’s offers have improved somewhat for me, especially on issueA/issueB/issueC, while they consistently keep issueD and issueE near valueE, suggesting those may matter more to them, so I can give ground there while holding firm on issueA and issueB.

I am targeting about 0.80 utility: still strong for me, but with meaningful concessions on lower-weight issues D/E and now a moderate concession on issueC. At t=0.26 there is no need to collapse to the opponent’s low offers, though their bids show occasional movement on issueA/issueB and some willingness around issueC. Since my last bid was issueA/valueA, issueB/valueA, issueC/valueA, issueD/valueE, issueE/valueE, I avoid repeating it by conceding issueC to valueB while holding firm on the two highest-weight issues.

I am targeting a still-strong utility around 0.74 while making a meaningful concession because we are moving into the early mid-game at t=0.28. The opponent’s latest offer improved substantially for me, especially on issueA and issueC, so I will preserve those gains while conceding moderately on high-weight issueB rather than dropping too far. No opponent messages were provided, so I rely only on the bid history.

I am targeting about 0.72 utility, conceding modestly because we are around t=0.30 but not yet near the deadline. The opponent’s recent offers have improved substantially for me, especially on issueA and issueC, while they still push issueB and the low-weight issues downward; I will hold issueA/issueC high, compromise issueB, and concede issueD/issueE.

I am targeting a utility of about 0.70, which is a moderate concession from my earlier high-utility offers while still preserving my most important issueA at valueA. At t=0.32 there is some time pressure but it is not yet late, so I am conceding mainly on lower/medium-priority issues rather than giving up too much on issueA and issueB. The opponent has occasionally offered strong values on issueA/issueB/issueC but often holds issueD/issueE low for me, so this bid tests a tradeoff close to their revealed range without repeating my last bid.

I am targeting a utility around 0.76, keeping my highest-weight issueA at valueA while conceding on issueB, issueC, and especially issueE. At t=0.34 there is still time, so I should not drop too far, but the opponent has repeatedly signaled willingness to offer valueA on issueA and recently issueD, so I can improve issueD without making the bid implausible. Their offers to me have risen at times but remain inconsistent, so I am making a moderate tradeoff rather than accepting their latest lower-utility pattern.

I am targeting about 0.74 utility: still strong for me at t=0.36, but with meaningful concessions compared with my early all-valueA bids. The opponent’s recent offers have improved on issueA and issueC, but they still push very hard against me on issueB and issueE, so I will hold issueA and issueC relatively firm while conceding the lower-weight issueE and moderating issueB.

I am targeting about 0.72 utility, keeping strong outcomes on the high-weight issues while conceding the lower-weight issueD and issueE. At t=0.38 there is some time pressure but not enough to accept the opponent’s poorer recent bids; their offers show willingness to give issueA=valueA and sometimes issueC=valueA/valueB, while they remain tough on issueB and issueE.
